content: Phase 1: Backend - Enhanced /api/events with UA parsing, IP geo enrichment, enriched schema
Phase 1: Backend - Lead scoring v1 on /api/leads/submit
Phase 1: Backend - New analytics endpoints (executive, funnel-detailed, friction, quality, trends, geo, attribution, device, visitors, events-health, lead-ops, smart-insights)
Phase 1: Backend - Add MongoDB indexes for analytics fields
Phase 2: Frontend - Enhanced analytics.js with step timing, viewport, page_url, visitor_type
Phase 2: Frontend - Add tlj_session_start, tlj_step_view, tlj_step_abandon events in WizardContext
Phase 3: UI - Rebuild AnalyticsDashboard.js with tabbed layout + global date filter
Phase 3: UI - Build all analytics tab components (Executive, Funnel, Friction, Quality, Geo, Attribution, Device, Visitors, Events Health, Smart Insights)
Phase 4: Testing & verification with testing agent
